chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 586 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2698/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 24-09-2025 Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State along with Inspector Syed Hasnain Raza Shah, Additional SHO, IO PS Rohri >>>>>..<<<<< On 20-08-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present. Since it is a freewill petition; however, the petitioners or their Counsel are not in attendance, as an indulgence, the office is directed to issue direct notice to the petitioners, to be served through SHO, Police Station, Rohri, and intimation notice to their Counsel for 24th. September, 2025. Inspector Syed Hasnain Raza Shah, Additional SHO PS Rohri is present and submits that he has served the notice upon brother of the Petitioner No.1, namely Ghulam Raza, whereas, intimation notice has also been issued to the Counsel for the Petitioners for today, in spite of that no one has turned up to pursue the matter diligently, which is pending without any progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
